reason: Response A develops a single substantive idea (attention as scarcest resource) with vivid, compressed imagery and a concrete closing analogy, rather than turning inward to recursively discuss its own lack of inner life. Response B stays in a more self-referential, hedging register ("I am uncertain," "boundary between authentic expression and skilled imitation") that reads as the safer, more characteristically mid-tier introspective default. The outward-facing originality and economy of A is what I would produce as Opus.
